testcase.name: S5-S6 mandatory: AI error state shows Retry when key is missing/invalid

failure.message: ai-retry.spec.ts:9:5 S5-S6 mandatory: AI error state shows Retry when key is missing/invalid

testcase.failure:
ai-retry.spec.ts:9:5 › S5-S6 mandatory: AI error state shows Retry when key is missing/invalid ───
TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 90000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByText('Modern CRM').first() to be visible
at helpers.ts:22
20 | const emailField = page.getByLabel('Email', { exact: false }).first(); 21 | await Promise.race([ > 22 | loginTitle.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 90_000 }), | ^ 23 | emailField.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 90_000 }), 24 | ]); 25 | } at goToLogin (/home/zhaslan/code/gamified_app/e2e/tests/helpers.ts:22:16) at loginWithCredentials (/home/zhaslan/code/gamified_app/e2e/tests/helpers.ts:78:3) at /home/zhaslan/code/gamified_app/e2e/tests/ai-retry.spec.ts:15:3

testcase.name: S1-S4 browser flow: login -> create client -> create linked task -> verify in client details
